reasoning: The order is marked as Complete and the item status shows Shipped with full payment captured ($156.72) and no refunds issued. The customer claims the tracking shows delivered but the package was not received; however, no tracking number or carrier delivery confirmation details are visible on this order view. Since the shipment is already marked delivered/shipped and there is no immediate evidence of fulfillment error, this case requires further investigation with the shipping carrier (proof of delivery, delivery location, timestamp) and possibly customer confirmation (e.g., neighbors, building management). Escalating to logistics/fraud review is appropriate before approving or denying a refund.
